title: Closing Price Stage B Lipsync Record
description: Lipsync / post-dialogue record for one shot or scene segment. Introduced in Stage B PR1 as additive groundwork.

lipsync_id.description: Stable unique identifier for this lipsync record.

scene_id.description: Scene this lipsync record belongs to.

shot_id.description: Shot or segment identifier within the scene, if applicable.

source_dialogue_ref.description: Reference to the source dialogue passage (e.g. line range, cue label, or scene_excerpt offset).

audio_ref.description: Relative path to the source audio file used for lipsync input.

model.description: Lipsync model identifier used to generate this record.

model_version.description: Specific version of the lipsync model used.

output_ref.description: Relative path to the lipsync output file.

qc_status.description: Quality-control outcome for this lipsync output.

created_utc.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this record was created.
